pi_items.source: Searching the bundled ReqView ExampleProject SRS.json shows that Section 1.1 is actually 'Purpose' (ID 'SRS-2'). There is no 'SRS-1.1' ID or matching requirement.
Searching the bundled ReqView ExampleProject SRS.json for 'User Identification' returns no matches. The heading does not exist.
setup_task.sh lines 13-25 dynamically create this file and save it.
setup_task.sh explicitly creates the PNG image at this absolute path.
setup_task.sh defines PROJECT_PATH by calling setup_task_project 'attach_ui_mockup', which copies the ExampleProject to this path.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions ask to attach a mockup to requirement 'SRS-1.1' with heading 'User Identification'. However, analysis of the ReqView ExampleProject data (SRS.json) reveals that neither ID 'SRS-1.1' nor heading 'User Identification' actually exist (Section 1.1 is 'Purpose'). The attachment 'login_mockup.png' is dynamically generated at '/home/ga/Documents/Assets/login_mockup.png'. The task environment sets up the ReqView project at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/attach_ui_mockup_project'.
